headline: Reflecting On Mixed or Offshore Upstream E&P Stocks’ Q1 Earnings: APA Corporation (NASDAQ:APA)
summary: The end of the earnings season is always a good time to take a step back and see who shined (and who not so much). Let’s take a look at how mixed or offshore upstream e&p stocks fared in Q1, starting with APA Corporation (NASDAQ:APA).
